reviews.comment:
Buen día. Solo quiero decir que la atención de los playeros muy buena,lastima el jefe del acá Germán daglio que se tomó atribuciones hacia mi vehículo que no le corresponde,me parece una total falta de respeto hacer eso sin pedir permiso.

(Translated by Google)
Good morning. I just want to say that the service from the attendants was very good, it's a shame that the manager here, Germán Daglio, took liberties with my vehicle that weren't his responsibility. I think it's a total lack of respect to do that without asking permission.
